texto: If the anti-abortion movement took a tenth of the energy they put into noisy theatrics and devoted it to improving the lives of children who have been born into lives of poverty, violence, and neglect, they could make a world shine.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Jay Tucker sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If the anti-abortion movement took a tenth of the energy they put into noisy theatrics and devote…” articula reflexao, feminism, lives em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
